name: The Student Advantage in AI Innovation
shortDescription: How being a student founder can accelerate creative problem solving in AI.
author: Neubofy Team

content.text: Students often approach problems with fewer assumptions, which can lead to more creative solutions. Limited resources encourage rapid prototyping and pragmatic engineering.
The learning mindset is a huge advantage: quick experimentation, rapid iteration, and the ability to ask naive questions that uncover hidden constraints.
If you're a student founder, use curiosity as your superpower: test ideas quickly and learn from real users.
